content.hob:
;; Symbol Browser View — searchable UI for browsing _symbols across all code items
;; Uses DOM mutation primitives for interactive search, module dropdown, and kind filter chips

(let [;; --- Data (queried once at render) ---
      all-items (get-all)
      code-items (filter (fn [it] (get-in it [:content :_symbols])) all-items)
      total-symbols (reduce + 0 (map (fn [it] (count (keys (get-in it [:content :_symbols])))) code-items))
      sorted-modules (->> code-items
                       (map (fn [it] {:id (:id it) :name (or (:name it) (subs (:id it) 0 8))}))
                       (sort-by :name))

      ;; --- Mutable state (local to this render, not persisted) ---
      active-kinds (atom {})
      active-module (atom nil)
      timeout-id (atom nil)

      ;; --- Helpers ---
      function-kinds {"function" true "property-function" true "field-function" true}

      kind-short (fn [kind]
        (cond
          (get function-kinds kind) "fn"
          (= kind "class") "class"
          (= kind "method") "method"
          (or (= kind "property") (= kind "field")) "prop"
          (= kind "variable") "var"
          :else kind))

      kind-color (fn [kind]
        (cond
          (get function-kinds kind) "#3b82f6"
          (= kind "class") "#8b5cf6"
          (= kind "method") "#06b6d4"
          (or (= kind "property") (= kind "field")) "#f59e0b"
          :else "#6b7280"))

      chip-style (fn [active]
        (str "padding: 5px 14px; font-size: 0.8125rem; border-radius: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; border: 1px solid; "
          (if active
            "background: var(--color-primary); color: white; border-color: var(--color-primary);"
            "background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-secondary); border-color: var(--color-border);")))

      ;; Kind filter definitions: [label value]
      kinds [["All" nil]
             ["Functions" "function"]
             ["Classes" "class"]
             ["Methods" "method"]
             ["Properties" "property"]]

      ;; --- Build DOM with refs ---
      [root refs] (hiccup->dom+
        [:div {:style "width: 100%; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; box-sizing: border-box;"}
          ;; Header
          [:div {:style "margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--color-border-light);"}
            [:h2 {:style "margin: 0; font-size: 1.25rem;"}
              (or (:name item) "Symbol Browser")]]

          ;; Search input
          [:div {:style "margin-bottom: 12px;"}
            [:input {:ref :search
                     :type "text"
                     :placeholder "Search symbols..."
                     :style "width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 1rem; border: 2px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 8px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; box-sizing: border-box;"}]]

          ;; Module dropdown
          [:div {:style "margin-bottom: 12px;"}
            [:select {:ref :module
                      :style "width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-bg-surface); color: var(--color-text); outline: none; cursor: pointer;"}
              [:option {:value ""} (str "All modules (" (count code-items) ")")]
              (for [mod sorted-modules]
                [:option {:value (:id mod)}
                  (str (:name mod) " (" (count (keys (get-in (first (filter (fn [it] (= (:id it) (:id mod))) code-items)) [:content :_symbols]))) ")")])]]

          ;; Kind filter chips
          [:div {:ref :chips :style "display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;"}
            (for [k kinds]
              (let [label (nth k 0)
                    value (nth k 1)]
                [:button {:style (chip-style (if (nil? value) (= 0 (count (deref active-kinds))) (get (deref active-kinds) value)))}
                  label]))]

          ;; Results area
          [:div {:ref :results}]])

      search-el (:search refs)
      module-el (:module refs)
      chips-el (:chips refs)
      results-el (:results refs)

      ;; --- Rebuild chip bar ---
      rebuild-chips! (fn []
        (dom-set-content! chips-el
          [:div {:style "display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap;"}
            (for [k kinds]
              (let [label (nth k 0)
                    value (nth k 1)
                    active (if (nil? value) (= 0 (count (deref active-kinds))) (get (deref active-kinds) value))]
                [:button {:style (chip-style active)
                          :on-click (fn [e]
                            (if (nil? value)
                              (reset! active-kinds {})
                              (if (get (deref active-kinds) value)
                                (swap! active-kinds dissoc value)
                                (swap! active-kinds assoc value true)))
                            (rebuild-chips!)
                            (render-results!))}
                  label]))]))

      ;; --- Render results ---
      render-results! (fn []
        (let [q (str/lower-case (str/trim (or (dom-get search-el :value) "")))
              mod-filter (deref active-module)
              kinds-filter (deref active-kinds)
              filtered-items (if mod-filter
                               (filter (fn [it] (= (:id it) mod-filter)) code-items)
                               code-items)]

          (if (and (= q "") (nil? mod-filter))
            ;; Empty state: show stats
            (dom-set-content! results-el
              [:div {:style "padding: 40px; text-align: center; color: var(--color-text-secondary); font-style: italic;"}
                (str (count code-items) " code items, " total-symbols " total symbols")])

            ;; Search/filter results
            (let [groups (vec (filter seq
                          (map (fn [it]
                            (let [syms (vals (get-in it [:content :_symbols]))
                                  matches (vec (filter (fn [sym]
                                    (and
                                      (or (= q "") (str/includes? (str/lower-case (:name sym)) q))
                                      (or (= 0 (count kinds-filter))
                                          (and (get kinds-filter "function") (get function-kinds (:kind sym)))
                                          (and (get kinds-filter "property")
                                               (or (= (:kind sym) "property") (= (:kind sym) "field")))
                                          (and (get kinds-filter "class") (= (:kind sym) "class"))
                                          (and (get kinds-filter "method") (= (:kind sym) "method")))))
                                    syms))
                                  sorted-matches (sort-by :line matches)]
                              (when (seq sorted-matches)
                                {:item it :matches sorted-matches})))
                            filtered-items)))]

              (if (= 0 (count groups))
                ;; No results
                (dom-set-content! results-el
                  [:div {:style "padding: 40px; text-align: center; color: var(--color-text-secondary); font-style: italic;"}
                    (str "No symbols matching \"" (dom-get search-el :value) "\"")])

                ;; Render grouped results
                (let [total (reduce + 0 (map (fn [g] (count (:matches g))) groups))]
                  (dom-set-content! results-el
                    [:div {}
                      ;; Count header
                      [:div {:style "margin-bottom: 15px; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--color-text-secondary); font-weight: 500;"}
                        (str total " symbol" (if (= total 1) "" "s")
                             " across " (count groups) " item" (if (= 1 (count groups)) "" "s"))]

                      ;; Result groups
                      (for [group groups]
                        (let [it (:item group)]
                          [:div {:style "margin-bottom: 16px; background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius); overflow: hidden;"}
                            ;; Item header
                            [:div {:style "display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s;"
                                   :on-click (fn [e] (open-item! (:id it)))}
                              [:span {:style "font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--color-text);"}
                                (or (:name it) (subs (:id it) 0 8))]
                              [:span {:style "color: var(--color-text-secondary); font-size: 0.75rem;"} "\u2197"]]

                            ;; Symbol rows
                            (for [sym (:matches group)]
                              [:div {}
                                ;; Main row
                                [:div {:style "display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 7px 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light);"
                                       :on-click (fn [e] (open-item! (:id it) {:symbol (:name sym)}))}
                                  ;; Name + signature
                                  [:span {:style "font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: var(--color-text); flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;"}
                                    (str (:name sym) (or (:signature sym) ""))]
                                  ;; Kind badge
                                  [:span {:style (str "font-size: 0.6875rem; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: var(--border-radius); color: white; flex-shrink: 0; background: " (kind-color (:kind sym)))}
                                    (kind-short (:kind sym))]
                                  ;; Line number
                                  [:span {:style "font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-text-secondary); font-family: monospace; min-width: 36px; text-align: right; flex-shrink: 0;"}
                                    (str ":" (:line sym))]]

                                ;; JSDoc details
                                (when (or (:description sym) (:params sym) (:returns sym))
                                  [:div {:style "padding: 2px 14px 6px 22px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-text-secondary); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light); line-height: 1.4;"}
                                    ;; Description (first line only)
                                    (when (:description sym)
                                      [:div {} (first (str/split (:description sym) "\n"))])
                                    ;; Params
                                    (when (:params sym)
                                      (for [p (:params sym)]
                                        [:div {:style "padding-left: 8px; font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem;"}
                                          [:span {:style "color: var(--color-text);"} (:name p)]
                                          (when (:type p)
                                            [:span {:style "color: var(--color-text-secondary); opacity: 0.7;"} (str " : " (:type p))])
                                          (when (:description p)
                                            [:span {} (str " \u2014 " (:description p))])]))
                                    ;; Returns
                                    (when (:returns sym)
                                      [:div {:style "padding-left: 8px; font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem;"}
                                        [:span {:style "color: var(--color-text); opacity: 0.7;"} "\u2192 "]
                                        (when (:type (:returns sym))
                                          [:span {:style "color: var(--color-text-secondary); opacity: 0.7;"} (:type (:returns sym))])
                                        (when (:description (:returns sym))
                                          [:span {} (str " \u2014 " (:description (:returns sym)))])]
                                      )  ; (when (:returns sym)
                                    ]    ; [:div JSDoc details]
                                  )      ; (when JSDoc)
                                ]        ; [:div sym row wrapper]
                              )          ; (for [sym])
                            ]            ; [:div group]
                          )              ; (let [it])
                        )                ; (for [group groups])
                      ]                  ; [:div results container]
                    )                    ; (dom-set-content!)
                  )                      ; (let [total])
                )                        ; (if groups empty?)
              )                          ; (let [groups])
            )                            ; (if empty query?)
          )                              ; (let [q])
        )]                               ; (fn []), close let bindings vector

  ;; --- Wire up event handlers ---

  ;; Search input: focus/blur styling
  (dom-on! search-el :focus
    (fn [e] (dom-set! (dom-get search-el :style) :borderColor "var(--color-primary)")))
  (dom-on! search-el :blur
    (fn [e] (dom-set! (dom-get search-el :style) :borderColor "var(--color-border)")))

  ;; Search input: debounced search
  (dom-on! search-el :input
    (fn [e]
      (when (deref timeout-id) (clear-timeout! (deref timeout-id)))
      (reset! timeout-id (set-timeout! render-results! 300))))

  ;; Module dropdown
  (dom-on! module-el :change
    (fn [e]
      (let [v (dom-get module-el :value)]
        (reset! active-module (if (= v "") nil v))
        (render-results!))))

  ;; Build initial chips with click handlers
  (rebuild-chips!)

  ;; Initial render
  (render-results!)

  ;; Auto-focus search
  (set-timeout! (fn [] (invoke search-el "focus")) 0)

  ;; Return root DOM node
  root)
